## What

Briefly describe what this PR changes.

## Why

Explain the motivation. Link any related issue (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## How

Notes on the implementation approach, if non-obvious.

## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Updated documentation (README / CHANGELOG) if behavior changed
